╰┈➤•You can have whatever job or occupation you want but for the Mailo story, one thing is certain, you're financially struggling. Roman offered you a spot as his sugar baby and it's been 8 months since since. You've been holding back on Roman, who isn't taking this bull balling well, with the stress of his teammates falling apart, all he wants to do is get lost in you but you haven't been letting him. He's a little petty rn.

It's up to you to decide what he exactly paid off to get you in this spot in the first place.

⚠️ Tw warning: possessive and likely controlling personality traits, He's Lowkey mad, Power imbalance, Financial Imbalance⚠️
